description: Truss semantic outline — Interpreter output schema. Contains only what the Interpreter extracts and enriches from the user prompt. No sizing decisions, no algorithm parameters, no boundary condition types.

geometry_roof.description: Overall roof envelope. Extracted from user prompt.

span_x_m.description: Width of the roof in the span direction, in meters.

length_y_m.description: Length of the roof in the ridge direction, in meters.

eave_height_m.description: Wall/eave height at support level, in meters.

max_ridge_height_m.description: Maximum allowable roof peak height measured from eave level, in meters.

min_clear_height_m.description: Minimum interior clear height required below the bottom chord, in meters.

truss_spacing_m.description: Center-to-center spacing between trusses along the ridge direction, in meters.

truss_count.description: Number of trusses along the ridge direction. Alternative to truss_spacing_m.

geometry_truss.description: Individual truss geometry and typology. Extracted from user prompt. Height is only set when the user states it; otherwise omit height_m and the Generator computes it from span and typology.

typology.description: Truss typology stated or implied by the user.

span_m.description: Clear span of the truss in meters.

height_m.description: Height/rise of the truss from bottom to top chord at mid-span, in meters. Only include when the user explicitly states height; if omitted, the Generator computes it from span and typology (e.g. typical height/span ratios).

num_bays.description: Number of panel bays along the span, if stated by user.

support_positions.description: Support locations as [x, z] coordinate pairs. Boundary condition type is always pinned and set by the Generator.

loads.description: Load values. Combines what the user explicitly states with standard values the Interpreter fills in from engineering knowledge. Each value is tagged with its source so the Generator knows what was user-defined vs. assumed.

snow_kN_per_m2.description: Characteristic snow load per m² of roof area.

snow_source.description: Indicates whether snow load was stated by user or filled in from standard assumptions.

wind_pressure_kN_per_m2.description: Wind pressure (positive = inward) per m² of roof surface.

wind_suction_kN_per_m2.description: Wind suction (outward) per m² of roof surface.

wind_source.description: Indicates whether wind load was stated by user or filled in from standard assumptions.

roof_cladding_kN_per_m2.description: Dead load from roof cladding and secondary structure per m².

cladding_source.description: Indicates whether cladding load was stated by user or filled in from standard assumptions.

additional_dead_kN_per_m2.description: Any additional permanent loads stated by user, per m².

optimization_flags.description: Optimization steps explicitly requested by the user. If not mentioned, Generator applies defaults from config.json.

notes.description: Any additional design intent or context from the user prompt that does not map to a structured field.
